items.title: Not Giving Money to His Church is the Same as Engaging in Homosexuality, Grace City Pastor Says
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump thanks Fifa for overturning USA striker's ban
items.dek: Folarin Balogun is available to play for the United States in their World Cup last-16 tie against Belgium after his one-game ban is suspended by Fifa.
items.body: Folarin Balogun is available to play for the United States in their World Cup last-16 tie against Belgium after his one-game ban is suspended by Fifa.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Eight rescued from seaplane that made 'hard landing' in Manhattan river
items.dek: Eight people were removed from the Kodiak 100 seaplane by fire department units and two had minor injures.
items.body: Eight people were removed from the Kodiak 100 seaplane by fire department units and two had minor injures.
items.author: IriLine Desk
